title: Preserve default software fixture metadata
reason: The root ni contract is also used by contract package tests as the canonical default software/CLI fixture; v0.2 conversation-authoring scope is captured in purpose, capabilities, requirements, decisions, risks, evaluations, and docs without changing fixture metadata.
proposed_changes: Restore product_type to software and delivery_surfaces to cli so the root checked-in contract remains the canonical default fixture.
Keep the v0.2 conversation-authoring plan in project purpose, CAP-005, REQ-005, DEC-009, RISK-011, EVAL-006, and docs/plan.
risk_impact: No weakening of conversation-authoring scope; this preserves existing software/CLI fixture expectations while leaving the v0.2 authoring decisions and no contract add/list/set boundary intact.
readiness_impact: Expected to remain READY because accepted capabilities, linked evaluations, artifacts, and mitigated high-severity risks are unchanged.
